function.message: Processed the next inbox item by running the six requested finance records through the OCR-to-frontmatter workflow. Added YAML frontmatter to all listed files using the finance schema, preserved each original note body, and then deleted the processed inbox request file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree/read/context), inspected 99_system tree, read required workflow docs for inbox processing and OCR/migration, used finance schema-required fields only, preserved existing note bodies, and deleted the inbox item after full completion per 00_inbox rules.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly asked to OCR six specified finance docs. Each target file was read, then updated in-place with schema-compliant frontmatter (invoice/bill required fields and ordered lines) extracted from visible note content, consistent with 99_system workflows and finance schema. No security-triggering external URLs or credential/exfiltration requests were present in the inbox content. Finally, the processed inbox file was deleted as required.
